---
title: "Modernization"
subtitle: "Microsoft Client-Server to Hybrid-Cloud — transformation engine, target surface, program management"
doc-type: pillar-landing
audience: "CIOs · IT modernization leads · platform engineers · identity architects"
canon-source: "docs/planning/customer-documents-taxonomy.md §2.1"
pillar: modernization
date: 2026-04-24
aspirational: true
---

# Modernization {.unnumbered}

The **what transforms, what it transforms into, and the machinery that moves
data between the two.** UIAO modernization retires the AD-centric
Client/Server-era estate — Active Directory, GPO, DNS, DHCP, Kerberos, ADCS,
domain-joined devices — and governs its replacement in the Hybrid-Cloud
target surface of Entra ID, Intune, Azure Arc, IPAM, SASE, and Zero Trust.

::: {.callout-note title="Narrative entry point"}
New here? Start with [Client-Server to Hybrid-Cloud](client-server-to-hybrid-cloud/index.qmd)
— the 11-chapter narrative series that walks the full transformation arc,
from AD's hidden governance surface to the Hybrid-Cloud access plane.
:::

## Sub-categories

| Section | Scope | Leaf count |
|---|---|---|
| [A. Platform Substrate](platform-substrate/index.qmd) | WS2025, IIS, Gitea, Kerberos, PKI, backup, hardening — the host that runs everything | 8 |
| [B. Transformation Engine](transformation-engine/index.qmd) | PowerShell + Python + API scripts that analyse, plan, and deliver | 7 |
| [C. Identity (OrgTree / MOD_\*)](identity-orgtree/index.qmd) | OrgPath, dynamic groups, AUs, delegation, migration runbook | 11 |
| [D. Directory Migration (DM_\*)](directory-migration/index.qmd) | IPAM, DNS, DHCP, PKI, RADIUS, LDAP, sync, devices, NTP, DFS, SPN, Trusts | 12 |
| [E. Target Surface](target-surface/index.qmd) | Entra ID, Intune, Azure Arc, M365, AUs, CA, PIM | 7 |
| [F. Access Plane](access-plane/index.qmd) | MFA, Zero Trust, SASE, CBA, PAM, break-glass | 6 |
| [G. Network Transformation](network-transformation/index.qmd) | SD-WAN, IPAM, DNS, DHCP, firewall, 802.1X | 6 |
| [H. Program Management](program-management/index.qmd) | Master Project Plan, roadmap, ADRs, ServiceNow, SAM, training | 6 |

## Flagship narrative

- [Client-Server to Hybrid-Cloud](client-server-to-hybrid-cloud/index.qmd) — 11 chapters
  covering the full modernization arc from AD forest to governed Hybrid-Cloud
  target surface.

## Canonical invariants

Every page respects:

- **Boundary:** GCC-Moderate for M365 SaaS; IaaS (Arc, Azure) per ADR-001
  commercial-FedRAMP exception.
- **Source of truth:** every target surface state derives from a canonical
  plan stored in Gitea. UIAO does not mutate SSOT; it governs it.
- **Determinism:** the same inputs produce the same outputs. No hidden state,
  no human-in-the-loop interpretation.
- **Provenance:** every delivered change is attributable to a Git commit + a
  plan artifact + an operator or automation.
